nasb.text: The adversary has stretched out his hand Over all her precious things, For she has seen the nations enter her sanctuary, The ones whom You commanded That they should not enter into Your congregation.

esv.text: The enemy has stretched out his hands over all her precious things; for she has seen the nations enter her sanctuary, those whom you forbade to enter your congregation.

cnv.text: 敵人伸手奪取她的一切珍寶， 她看著外族人闖入她的聖所： 你曾禁止他們進入你的會中。

ccb.text: 敌人伸手夺去她的一切珍宝。 她目睹外族人闯入圣殿——那是耶和华禁止他们进入的地方。
